news.headline: Guizhou, China has over 30,000 bridges and half of the world's top 100 high bridges, creating roads through mountains.
news.summary: In Guiyang, China, as of February 23, 2025, Guizhou stands out as the sole province in China devoid of plains, boasting more than 30,000 bridges that are either finished or currently under construction. Remarkably, nearly 50% of the world's top 100 highest bridges can be found in this region. The residents of Guizhou have demonstrated exceptional engineering prowess by carving roads through challenging mountainous terrain.

news.headline: Amid Bybit hack pressure, Ethereum rollback considered impossible as stated by core dev Tim Beiko.
news.summary: Tim Beiko, a core developer of Ethereum, stated that despite increasing demands for an Ethereum network rollback, it is deemed "technically intractable" to implement.

news.headline: UK gov steps in as local dispute over film studio underscores efforts to boost economy. Conflict sparks debate on development strategies.
news.summary: The federal government has stepped into a dispute over local planning, showcasing its commitment to leveraging development as a tool for economic revitalization in Britain. This move underlines the government's dedication to intervening in matters critical to national development, emphasizing the importance of using such initiatives to boost the economy.

news.headline: First asteroid mining prospector ready for launch: AstroForge’s Odin mission to survey a potentially metallic asteroid.
news.summary: In the 2010s, the ambitious goal of mining metals in deep space faced a major setback. Despite this, AstroForge is preparing for its Odin mission, which aims to survey a promising metallic asteroid. The spacecraft is fully loaded and set for launch.

news.headline: Joy Reid's 7 pm show on MSNBC cancelled; replaced by panel show with co-hosts Symone Sanders, Alicia Menendez, and Michael Steele.
news.summary: The 7 p.m. program hosted by Ms. Reid will undergo a change, being replaced by a panel show featuring Symone Sanders Townsend, Alicia Menendez, and Michael Steele as co-hosts.

news.headline: Sanyou Bio reviews Intelligent Super-trillion Molecule Discovery Platform, highlights library capacity of up to 10 trillion molecules.
news.summary: In Shanghai on February 15, 2025, Sanyou Bio completed a comprehensive evaluation of its cutting-edge Intelligent Super-trillion Molecule Discovery Platform. The platform's key technology, the intelligent super-trillion molecule library, stands out with an impressive library capacity of up to 10.

news.headline: Bybit has almost replenished its Ether reserves to 50% of pre-hack levels following a $295 million ETH purchase.
news.summary: In a recent report, it was revealed that the unemployment rate in the country has surged to 8.9%, the highest level in over a decade. This increase has resulted in over 2.5 million people being out of work. The job market has been severely impacted by the ongoing economic crisis, with sectors such as hospitality, tourism, and retail being hit the hardest. Additionally, the report stated that the number of job vacancies has plummeted by 40%, making it even more challenging for those seeking employment.Experts predict that it will take several years for the job market to recover to pre-crisis levels.

news.headline: Halcyon Financial Technology, L.P. wins "Implementation/Partner" category at WealthTech Americas Awards 2025 in San Francisco.
news.summary: Halcyon Financial Technology, L.P., a prominent IT services provider catering to financial services companies, has been recognized as a victor in the "Implementation/Partner" division at The WealthBriefing WealthTech Americas Awards 2025. The event took place in San Francisco on February 21, 2025.

news.headline: Cre8mediaHub, LLC celebrates 15 years of digital innovation since 2010, founded by Hannah Zlatkiss (Bubis).
news.summary: In 2025, Cre8mediaHub, LLC, a renowned company in the digital media, marketing, and advertising sector, will commemorate its 15th year since establishment. Under the leadership of industry expert Hannah Zlatkiss (Bubis), the company was founded in 2010. Over the years, Cre8mediaHub has focused on providing groundbreaking digital solutions, aiding in various marketing endeavors.

news.headline: Marcus Lemonis, CEO of Camping World, to speak at Finance & Accounting Technology Expo (FATE) 2025 in NYC Nov 13-14.
news.summary: The Finance & Accounting Technology Expo (FATE) 2025 is scheduled to take place on November 13-14 at the prestigious Jacob Javits Center. The event will showcase Marcus Lemonis, CEO of Camping World and renowned television personality from The Profit, as the keynote speaker. FATE promises to offer attendees a unique opportunity to engage with top-level speakers, explore the latest in technological advancements, and participate in valuable networking activities. This exclusive event is a must for professionals in the finance and accounting industry.

news.headline: NameHero® opens new data center in London, aims to boost hosting speed for European clients. Kansas City-based provider.
news.summary: NameHero® has announced global expansion with the launch of a new data center in London, UK. This move aims to improve hosting speed and performance for customers in Europe. The company, based in Kansas City, Missouri, made the announcement on Feb. 21, 2025. NameHero® is known for offering web hosting, WordPress hosting, and reseller hosting solutions to its clients. This strategic decision is expected to significantly benefit its European customer base by providing faster and more reliable hosting services.

news.headline: Sandy Vans introduces YouTube series SVTV showcasing van builds. Launch on Feb. 21, 2025 from San Diego.
news.summary: A premier custom adventure Sprinter Van builder, Sandy Vans, has unveiled Sandy Vans TV (SVTV), a fresh YouTube TV series showcasing the van customization process. The show aims to reach audiences globally. The launch took place on Feb. 21, 2025, in SAN DIEGO, California.

news.headline: Chacruna's Psychedelic Culture Conference on March 29-30 in San Francisco's Brava Theater to feature presenters from ancient and modern practices.
news.summary: The Psychedelic Culture conference, branded by Chacruna, is scheduled to take place on March 29 and 30, 2025, at San Francisco's Brava Theater. The event will span two days and feature presentations across three tracks. Attendees can expect insights from presenters representing ancient traditions as well as modern innovations. The conference will convene at the renowned Brava Theater in San Francisco, bringing together a diverse range of perspectives in the field.

news.headline: Miami-Dade's $1M+ single-family home sales rise in January 2025; affordable condo transactions also up, leading US market.
news.summary: In January 2025, there was a noticeable rise in the transactions of single-family homes priced at $1 million and higher, as well as affordable condos in Miami-Dade County. This growth has been observed year-over-year, indicating a positive trend in the South Florida real estate market, positioning it as a leading market nationwide.

news.headline: Sarasota Efoil rebrands as Opua Adventures, adds E-bikes. New location at 2163 Siesta Drive, Sarasota, FL 34239.
news.summary: Opua Adventures, previously Sarasota Efoil, recently rebranded and broadened its services to now offer E-bike rentals and sales alongside its current offerings of E-foil lessons and Seabob rentals. The company has relocated to 2163 Siesta Drive, Sarasota, FL 34239 for its operations.

news.headline: Vendux introduces Vendux Connect™ to provide businesses with direct sales expertise through consultations, without long-term commitments.
news.summary: Vendux has recently introduced Vendux Connect™, a new service aiming to assist businesses in tackling intricate sales hurdles through specialized consultations. This service provides guidance without the commitment of lengthy consulting contracts. By introducing Vendux Connect™, the company broadens its range of services and aims to cater to businesses dealing with challenging sales environments.

news.headline: Women Grow Leadership Summit 2025 gathered 500+ attendees to promote advocacy, equity, and empowerment in the cannabis industry.
news.summary: Over 500 individuals came together at The Women Grow Leadership Summit 2025 in National Harbor, Maryland this week. The attendees focused on unity, collective action, and the advancement of women's rights in the cannabis industry. The summit aimed to empower women and drive impactful change within the sector.

news.headline: Olit Hookalit 40000: Vape kit offers 40ml reservoir, 1300mAh battery, 40,000 MTL puffs / 20,000 DL puffs.
news.summary: Introducing the Olit Vape Hookah Kit, a cutting-edge device merging capacity and technology. This kit boasts a 40ml pre-filled e-juice tank, a powerful 1300mAh rechargeable battery, and a lit mesh coil for intensified flavor. Users can enjoy up to 40,000 puffs (MTL) or 20,000 puffs (DL) before needing a refill. The device also features a digital indicator screen for easy monitoring.

news.headline: Karns and Karns law firm introduces a specialized Truck Accident Division to offer expert legal representation. Los Angeles, Feb 22, 2025.
news.summary: A prominent personal injury law firm, Karns and Karns, has recently broadened its offerings by introducing a specialized Truck Accident Division. This new division aims to deliver specialized legal representation for individuals involved in truck accidents. The expansion comes as Karns and Karns continues to establish itself as a top player in the field of personal injury law. The firm, based in Los Angeles, made the announcement on Feb. 22, 2025. This development underscores Karns and Karns' commitment to providing expert legal services in the realm of truck accident cases.

news.headline: TAIM EXCHANGE launches new trading engine for faster and efficient transactions on platform. Located in Boston, news from Feb. 22, 2025.
news.summary: TAIM EXCHANGE, a prominent digital asset trading platform, has introduced a cutting-edge trading engine to enhance transaction speeds and efficiency on its platform. The new engine, unveiled in Boston on February 22, 2025, is aimed at optimizing performance during trades on the platform.

news.headline: Harris Teeter celebrates Supermarket Employee Day on Feb. 22 to honor team's hard work and dedication.
news.summary: Harris Teeter employees in Matthews, North Carolina, were honored for their dedication and hard work within their communities. On February 22, 2025, Harris Teeter participated in the fifth-annual Supermarket Employee Day, alongside grocery stores and food producers across the country. This event aims to show appreciation for the efforts of supermarket staff.

news.headline: Mountain Vector Energy debuts Cufflink Vision to end manual utility bill data entry, yielding a 90% reduction in entry.
news.summary: Mountain Vector Energy has rolled out Cufflink Vision, an innovative feature that revolutionizes utility bill data entry by utilizing advanced AI models to automatically extract, standardize, and incorporate data. Users of Cufflink Vision have experienced a significant 90% decrease in manual data entry efforts.

news.headline: General Needs donated 2,113 boots to veterans, equivalent to the height of NY's Chrysler Building in 2024.
news.summary: In 2024, an impressive number of boots were donated, totaling the height of the renowned Chrysler Building in New York. This figure amounted to 1,046 feet of donated boots, symbolizing a significant gesture of support for homeless or struggling veterans in need. The donated footwear was aimed at providing essential assistance and warmth to those who have served their country and may be experiencing hardships. Such a substantial donation highlights the generosity and care shown towards veterans facing challenging circumstances.

news.headline: Upcoming crime drama series "I Am Bone" follows Shawn "Bone" Martin's life, produced by Del La Pour Media and Paloma Films.
news.summary: Del La Pour Media and Films, in collaboration with Paloma Films and Shawn Martin, have revealed the development of a new crime drama series titled "I Am Bone," inspired by Shawn "Bone" Martin's real-life experiences. The TV show, currently in production, will explore Martin's life in depth.

news.headline: USBC Interiors in Dubai now offers residential and commercial design services, focusing on quality and client collaboration.
news.summary: A respected interior design company based in Dubai, USBC Interiors, has expanded its services to cover residential and commercial projects. The firm is recognized for its attention to detail and commitment to excellence, working closely with clients to create bespoke and functional spaces.

news.headline: Global implications of Germany's election results are crucial; impacts on economy, foreign policy, with over 60 million voters.
Approval of Solana ETF could elevate it from ‘memechain’ to a serious contender, boosting institutional trust for large-scale financial use.
news.summary: The transition of Solana from a hub for memecoins to a major player in the blockchain industry relies heavily on the green light for a Solana exchange-traded fund (ETF). If approved, this ETF could boost institutional confidence in Solana and unleash its capabilities for widespread financial uses such as payments and trading. This move would mark a significant turning point in Solana's trajectory, especially with approximately **80** projects building on its network and its market capitalization reaching around **$**40 billion.

news.headline: Bitcoin needs to surpass $106K for new price discovery as traders await a move from $85K to $106K for uptrend confirmation.
news.summary: Bitcoin is currently trading below the significant $100,000 mark, and traders believe that a push back to $106,000 is necessary to confirm an upward trend. Nevertheless, there are some who anticipate a potential drop to $85,000.

news.headline: Austria moves away from Russian gas as OMV expands own natural gas output, drills for oil, and explores geothermal energy. #energytransition
news.summary: A multinational energy company headquartered in Vienna, OMV, has diversified its strategies by ramping up its natural gas production, exploring oil drilling opportunities, and exploring the potential of geothermal energy.

news.headline: Western energy firms are being courted by Russia. They must consider opportunities in oil and gas amidst political risks.
news.summary: Experts in the industry are advising Western organizations to carefully consider the opportunity to tap into Russia's significant oil and gas resources in light of the possible political uncertainties and other risks associated with operating there.

news.headline: Lyons Magnus recalls 4 oz. ReadyCare and Sysco Frozen Shakes due to Listeria risk - Feb 22, 2025.
news.summary: Lyons Magnus LLC, based in Fresno, California, recently disclosed a voluntary recall of 4 oz. Lyons ReadyCare and Sysco Imperial Frozen Supplemental Shakes manufactured by the company. The recall was initiated due to concerns over potential contamination with Listeria monocytogenes, a dangerous pathogen. Customers are strongly advised not to consume these products to prevent any health risks associated with the contamination.

news.headline: Aeroband chosen as exclusive music brand for 56th NAACP Image Awards®, promoting innovation and culture in LA.
news.summary: Aeroband, a leading smart music technology company based in Los Angeles, revealed on February 22, 2025, it has been chosen as the exclusive musical instrument brand for the 56th NAACP Image Awards® Official Celebrity. This news signifies a significant milestone for the company in empowering musicians worldwide.

news.headline: Ethereum rollback is considered impossible by core developer Tim Beiko amid pressure from Bybit hack.
news.summary: Tim Beiko, a core developer for Ethereum, has stated that there are increasing demands for a rollback of the Ethereum network; however, he believes that this process is "technically intractable."

news.headline: Trice Contracting Inc. expands expert masonry services in NYC due to high demand for building restoration and construction.
news.summary: In New York City on February 22, 2025, Trice Contracting Inc., a prominent company known for its masonry services, shared news of its expansion to meet the increasing need for top-tier building restoration and construction services. This move comes as the demand for quality masonry work rises, indicating a surge in construction projects in the area. Trice Contracting Inc. is recognized for its expertise in this field and aims to cater to this escalating requirement by broadening its range of specialized masonry services.

news.headline: UnitedHealth's Medicare Advantage disclosure uncovers $83B in government overspending.
Berkshire to increase stakes in Japanese trading houses slowly, without mentioning numbers.
Prospera Energy Inc. reveals 2024 year-end reserves in Calgary, Alberta; TSX.V: PEI, OTC: GXRFF are stock symbols.
news.summary: On February 22, 2025, in Calgary, Alberta, Prospera Energy Inc. announced its stock identifiers as TSX.V: PEI and OTC: GXRFF. The company is referred to as Prospera, PEI, or the Corporation in the market.

news.headline: Coinbase prevails against SEC. What's the future for crypto regulation? #Cryptocurrency #SEC #Regulation
DOJ officials advise against sharing job info with Musk following request; unnamed source.

Stocks fall as S&P 500 hits record high, Walmart disappoints. Shares dropped as Walmart issued guidance below expectations and Palantir declines after Trump admin's budget cut warning. Initial jobless claims rose by 5,000. CEO of Palantir files to sell $1.2 billion shares. Oil prices rise above $72.
news.summary: Stocks fell the day after the S&P 500 hit a new high, with major indices all in the negative. Walmart's shares dipped due to lower fiscal 2026 guidance despite strong Q4 results. Palantir Technologies saw further declines following news of possible budget cuts. Jobless claims rose to 219,000, above the expected 215,000, while continuing claims stood at 186,900. WTI crude oil futures climbed above $72 amidst the market turbulence. Trump administration's order for Pentagon budget cuts also impacted market sentiment.

news.headline: AstraZeneca buys FibroGen's Chinese unit for $160 million, boosting FibroGen financially and extending cash runway.
news.summary: FibroGen Inc. (NASDAQ:FGEN) saw an uptick in its stock on Thursday after announcing the sale of its China subsidiary to AstraZeneca Plc (NASDAQ:AZN) for around $160 million. The move was described as a strategic one by Thane Wettig, the CEO of FibroGen, who highlighted that the sale would fortify the company on various fronts. This deal is anticipated to enhance FibroGen's financial standing, extending its cash runway significantly up to 2027. Moreover, it provides the company with the resources to advance the clinical development programs for FG-3246, an innovative CD46 targeting antibody-drug conjugate, and FG-3180, a companion PET imaging agent, in mCRPC. This news signals a positive development for FibroGen, showcasing a step towards financial stability and continued progress in its clinical offerings.

news.headline: Glencore and Rio Tinto considering leaving London Stock Exchange; Glencore may move to NYSE. Glencore's market cap: £40B ($50B)
news.summary: Mining giants Glencore and Rio Tinto are in talks with the London Stock Exchange regarding their listings, each for distinct reasons. Glencore, headquartered in Switzerland, is contemplating a potential shift to the New York Stock Exchange for better valuation prospects. CEO Gary Nagle stated that they aim to ensure their securities are traded on the most favorable exchange, considering options like NYSE. Glencore has been listed on the LSE since its $10 billion IPO in 2011 and currently holds a market capitalization of £40 billion ($50 billion), placing it among the top 20 valuable listings. However, a recent financial setback, as it reported a $1.6 billion net loss for 2024, may prompt a change in exchange. On the other hand, Rio Tinto is engaging with the LSE for different reasons, details of which can be found on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: Walmart expects slower growth in fiscal 2026 with revenue growth of 3-4%, below 5.1% in 2025, and earnings per share of $2.50-$2.60 compared to the $2.76 estimate. CFO attributes caution to uncertainty.
news.summary: Walmart, Inc. (NYSE:WMT) witnessed a drop in share value on Thursday following the release of its fiscal-year 2026 revenue and profit targets, both falling short of analysts' projections. The company anticipates a revenue growth of 3% to 4% for 2026, below the previous year's increase of 5.1%. Earnings are expected to range between $2.50 and $2.60 per share, lower than the estimated $2.76. Walmart CFO John David Rainey highlighted the heightened uncertainty affecting the company's outlook during a conference call with analysts, cautioning against overly optimistic expectations. Rainey emphasized the need to navigate carefully through the current period of unpredictability, stating, "We have to acknowledge that we are in an uncertain time. And we don’t want to get out over our skis here. There’s a lot of the year to play out."

uk to reveal set of restrictions against russia on monday afp
White House: Canadian border official to visit US next week
Is acquiring sections of Intel worth it for Broadcom? Analysts say it could bring significant profits.

Federal Home Loan Bank of San Francisco reports annual and Q4 2024 operating results in San Francisco on February 20, 2025.
news.summary: On February 20, 2025, the Federal Home Loan Bank based in San Francisco revealed its unaudited financial performance for both the full year and the final quarter of 2024.
